slots: Drive to Pachad at the foot of Raigad — ropeway base opens early. Weekends queue heavily; arrive before 8 am on Shiv Jayanti or holidays.
Ascend to the Rajyabhishek mandap where Shivaji Maharaj was crowned — the emotional heart of Maratha history. Explore queen’s chambers and granary ruins.
Walk carefully to the execution cliff viewpoint — dramatic when clouds part at dusk. Descend before fog thickens.
Second morning catches different light on the stone walls — monsoon mist is atmospheric; winter offers sharper Konkan views.
Descend toward the coast for Konkan fish thali — Raigad’s story continues in the villages that supplied the fort.
Stay overnight on the coast or return to Pune/Mumbai.
Strong hikers add neighbouring forts from the UNESCO Maratha Military Landscapes circuit.
Allow traffic buffer on Sunday evenings from Lonavala side.
Raigad is Maharashtra’s symbolic capital — allow a full day on the fort minimum.
